name: SetVideoOfflineLoggerCam
title: SetVideoOfflineLoggerCam
description: Sets the offline mode logger cam (type and prefix) for a CANoeVideo Window.

parameters.name: windowName
parameters.description: The name of the Video Window.

parameters.name: camType
parameters.description: The type of logger cam: 0|cCamlog2 1|cHostCam For details see the Image Files Properties in the CANoeVideo Configuration dialog.

parameters.name: filePrefix
parameters.description: The corresponding prefix of the image files generated by the cam. For cCamlog2 this can be omitted. For details see the Image Files Properties in the CANoeVideo Configuration dialog.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
